description_long: This is a classic glass beverage bottle with a contoured, ribbed body and a narrow neck, reminiscent of the iconic Coca-Cola design. The bottle features a red label wrapped around its midsection, with white script text visible on one side and partial branding on the other. The glass appears slightly translucent, allowing the dark brown liquid inside to be seen, and the bottle is capped with a small, rounded closure. The surface of the bottle is smooth and glossy, with subtle highlights and shading that suggest a hard, reflective material. The label is bright and visually striking, contrasting with the darker contents and clear glass. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the bottle.
description: A contoured glass beverage bottle with a red Coca-Cola label, filled with dark liquid and topped with a rounded cap. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and visually pristine.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from an angle showing the red label with partial white script and the contoured, ribbed glass body.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the bottle, with the full Coca-Cola logo in white script clearly visible on the red label.
description_view_2: The bottle is rotated to show the side of the label, revealing partial branding and the word 'mural' in white.
description_view_3: The back of the bottle is visible, with the red label mostly blank and no branding or text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red label with white Coca-Cola script logo, partially visible on the front and side; label wraps around the bottle's midsection.
